name: Vegetable Tortilla Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1 container (8 oz.) garden vegetable cream cheese
1 medium red bell pepper, cut into 24 (3x1/4") strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, cook the asparagus in a small amount of boiling water for 5 minutes or until crisp-tender. Drain on paper towels.
2. Spread one-fourth of the cream cheese over each tortilla.
3. On each tortilla, arrange two asparagus spears with three rows of three pepper strips each.
4. Firmly roll up each tortilla, starting from the non-cream cheese side. Wrap each roll tightly in plastic wrap.
5. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours before serving.
WARNING: Ensure the skillet is turned off after cooking the asparagus and that all steps are completed carefully to avoid any burns or splatters.
